scroller_feed: CRITICAL: NEW YORK, USA TARGETED FOR SUPPLY CHAIN BREAK | US GDP GROWTH RATE SLOWS TO 2.1% DUE TO GLOBAL ECONOMIC UNCERTAINTY. EUROPEAN MARKETS EXPERIENCE VOLATILITY AMIDST BREXIT NEGOTIATIONS. ASIAN MARKETS SEE INCREASE IN TRADE VOLUME WITH NEWLY SIGNED AGREEMENTS.
